title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXLI. Love And Matrimony.
content:
Willy, Willy Wilkin,
        Kissed the maids a-milking,
                                            Fa, la, la!
        And with his merry daffing,
        He set them all a laughing.
                                            Ha, ha, ha!
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXLI. Love And Matrimony."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
